query: SELECT section, COUNT(*) as cnt, MAX(createdAt) as latest FROM breaking_news GROUP BY section ORDER BY latest DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3aGZ9MSLrhgSbtV.0a4dfe1f8b2a --database UyPaon6i3Ec4nvfPz6kUfg --execute SELECT section, COUNT(*) as cnt, MAX(createdAt) as latest FROM breaking_news GROUP BY section ORDER BY latest DESC;
